name: webhook-sender
description: Sends processed records to HTTP webhook endpoints. Supports bearer/basic/API-key authentication, batching, retry with backoff, and circuit breaker.
author: hermes-core

base_url.title: Base URL
base_url.description: Root URL of the webhook target (e.g. https://api.example.com). The recipe path is appended to this value.

auth_type.title: Authentication Type
auth_type.description: Authentication scheme used for all outbound requests

auth_token.title: Auth Token / API Key
auth_token.description: Token, password, or API key used for authentication (combined with auth_type)

default_headers.title: Default Headers
default_headers.description: Static HTTP headers included in every request (key: header name, value: header value)

timeout_seconds.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a response from the target

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient HTTP errors (5xx, timeouts)

retry_backoff_ms.title: Retry Backoff (ms)
retry_backoff_ms.description: Initial backoff duration in milliseconds before retrying; doubled on each subsequent attempt

circuit_breaker_threshold.title: Circuit Breaker Failure Threshold
circuit_breaker_threshold.description: Number of consecutive failures before the circuit breaker opens and stops sending requests

circuit_breaker_recovery_seconds.title: Circuit Breaker Recovery (seconds)
circuit_breaker_recovery_seconds.description: Time in seconds the circuit breaker stays open before allowing a probe request

path.title: Request Path
path.description: URL path appended to base_url for each request (e.g. /events/ingest)

method.title: HTTP Method
method.description: HTTP verb used for the webhook request

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME type set in the Content-Type header of the request body

payload_template.title: Payload Template
payload_template.description: Handlebars/Liquid template for the request body. Leave empty to send the raw record as JSON.

batch_mode.title: Batch Mode
batch_mode.description: Send multiple records in a single request as a JSON array instead of one request per record

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of records per batched request (only used when batch_mode is true)

success_status_codes.title: Success Status Codes
success_status_codes.description: List of HTTP response status codes treated as successful delivery
